case_title: LING LA VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-28-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LING LA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KATHY ZUMSKI, PARALEGAL III. CONTINUANCE ALLOWED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF THE FEDERAL COURT FILING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA, LING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
